holdings.infoBox: VUG is an equity ETF with a total of 159 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.10%, Apple at 12.31%, Microsoft at 8.99%, Alphabet at 5.95%, and Broadcom at 5.16%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Growth ETF (VUG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Large Growth index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks in the US. Holdings are selected and weighed based on growth factors. VUG was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard Overtakes iShares as Largest ETF Provider in Historic Industry Shift
data.text: The ETF industry has reached a historic turning point. Vanguard has officially surpassed BlackRock's iShares to become the largest ETF provider.
